title: The Phantom of the Subway
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo braves the dark subway tunnels to find the phantom cat, which turns out to be a robot! 🐱

q.en: What mysterious creature is said to haunt the New Mouse City subway?
q.zh: 据说在新鼠城地铁里出没的神秘生物是什么？

explain.en: Riders report a humongous cat in the subway, with some saying it may even be a ghost cat.
explain.zh: 乘客们说地铁里有一只巨大的猫，还有人说是幽灵猫。

q.en: Who is Geronimo's archrival who owns the newspaper The Daily Rat?
q.zh: 谁是杰罗尼摩的死对头，也就是《老鼠日报》的竞争对手《每日鼠报》的老板？

options.en: Tina Spicytail according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 蒂娜·辣尾（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Sally Ratmousen is Geronimo's number-one enemy and the owner of The Daily Rat, his paper's biggest competition.
explain.zh: 萨莉·鼠莫森是杰罗尼摩的头号死敌，也是《每日鼠报》的老板，那是他报纸最大的竞争对手。

q.en: How do Geronimo and his friends get into the closed subway?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩和朋友们是怎么进入已经封闭的地铁的？

options.en: By climbing down the elevator shaft according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 顺着电梯井爬下去（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Through a sewer drain behind the fish market
options.zh: 从鱼市后面的一处下水道井盖钻进去

explain.en: Pinky shows them a drain in a narrow alley behind the fish market and they follow a sewer pipe to the number 7 line.
explain.zh: 平基带他们到鱼市后面小巷里的一处井盖，他们沿着下水道管道走到了七号线。

q.en: Who built the giant robot cat in the subway?
q.zh: 地铁里那只巨大的机器猫是谁造的？

options.en: Inspector Clue Rat according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 线索鼠探长（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: A mouse slides out of the robot cat's body and it is Geronimo's friend, Professor Paws von Volt, a brilliant inventor.
explain.zh: 一只老鼠从机器猫的身体里钻出来，那正是杰罗尼摩的朋友、天才发明家爪子·冯·沃尔特教授。

q.en: What is the professor's amazing remote-control invention called?
q.zh: 教授那个神奇的遥控发明叫什么名字？

options.zh: 沃尔特教授发明的遥控装置

explain.en: The professor calls his device the Voltinator; it can move any object through the air without touching it.
explain.zh: 教授把这个装置叫做沃尔特教授发明的遥控装置，它能不碰任何东西就让它飘起来移动。

q.en: What do the initials P.V. carved on the silver ring and the big oak door stand for?
q.zh: 刻在银戒指和那扇大橡木门上的字母缩写代表什么？

options.en: Phantom Vision according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 幽灵幻象（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Both the ring found on the floor and the hidden lab door are marked P.V., the initials of Professor Paws von Volt.
explain.zh: 地板上捡到的戒指和密室大门上都刻着相同的字母缩写，正是爪子·冯·沃尔特教授的姓名首字母。

q.en: What were the secret rooms under the city used for long ago?
q.zh: 城里地下的那些秘密房间很久以前是用来做什么的？

options.en: A subway station according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一座地铁站（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Communication during the Great Cat War
options.zh: 在猫之大战期间用来通信

explain.en: The professor says the rooms date back to the Great Cat War and were used for communication when the town was under attack.
explain.zh: 教授说这些房间可以追溯到猫之大战时期，当时城里被围攻，它们被用来对外通信。

q.en: Who is the championship golfer that also heads the whole subway system?
q.zh: 哪位高尔夫球冠军同时也是整个地铁系统的负责人？

explain.en: Geronimo mentions meeting Birdie Whiskers at the golf club; he is a championship golfer and head of the entire subway system.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩提到在高尔夫俱乐部见过胡须鸟，他既是高尔夫球冠军，也是整个地铁系统的负责人。

q.en: How does the group cross the smelly sewage canal underground?
q.zh: 大家是怎么穿过地下那条臭烘烘的下水道水沟的？

options.en: They swing across on a rope with a hooked end
options.zh: 他们抓着末端带钩的绳子荡过去

options.en: They swim through it according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他们游过去（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Thea throws a rope across the canal; its metal hook grabs the ladder on the far side and they cross hanging from it.
explain.zh: 茜亚把绳子甩过水沟，末端的金属钩勾住对面的梯子，大家抓着绳子荡了过去。

q.en: Which famous detective does Thea try to call for help with the subway case?
q.zh: 茜亚想打电话向哪位名侦探求助来破地铁案？

explain.en: Thea calls her big-shot friends including the world's most famous detective, Hercule Poirat, though no one will share info.
explain.zh: 茜亚给她那些大人物朋友打电话，其中就有世界上最著名的侦探赫拉克·波拉，不过没人愿意透露消息。
